# Story 5.1: Admin — Orders List, Detail, Search and Date Range Filter

Status: done

<!-- Generated by bmad-create-story workflow on 2026-05-21. Ultimate context engine analysis completed - comprehensive developer guide created. -->

## Story

As an admin,
I want xem danh sách đơn hàng, tìm theo mã đơn và lọc theo khoảng ngày, rồi mở chi tiết từng đơn,
so that tôi có thể kiểm tra lịch sử bán hàng và hỗ trợ vận hành/quầy nhanh mà không cần truy vấn kỹ thuật.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Given admin đã đăng nhập và có quyền admin, when mở trang `/admin/orders`, then sidebar admin hiển thị navigation item **"Đơn hàng"** ở nhóm chính, nằm **trên "Menu"**, dẫn tới `/admin/orders`, có active state đúng khi ở `/admin/orders`, và không làm thay đổi các mục hiện có: Dashboard, Menu, Báo cáo.
2. Given route admin hiện có dùng TailAdmin layout, when truy cập `/admin/orders`, then page render trong layout/style/component hiện hữu của admin: `PageBreadcrumb`, card/filter panel TailAdmin, `AdminDataTable`, `AdminButton`, `AdminInput`/date input style tương thích; không tạo layout/sidebar riêng.
3. Given có đơn hàng đã sync trên server, when trang Orders load thành công, then hiển thị bảng danh sách tất cả đơn trong tenant/store hiện tại; mỗi row đại diện **một order** và hiển thị tối thiểu: mã đơn (`orderCode`), thời gian bán (`soldAt`), tổng tiền (`total` format VND integer), phương thức thanh toán, số dòng/số món, trạng thái void/chưa void nếu có, và thao tác xem chi tiết.
4. Given admin cần xem chi tiết, when click button **"Xem chi tiết"** trên một row, then hiển thị order detail cho user trong modal/drawer/dialog theo style admin hiện có, gồm tối thiểu: mã đơn, thời gian bán, cashier nếu API có, payment method, discount, total, danh sách items với `productNameSnapshot`, quantity, `unitPriceSnapshot`, options `labelSnapshot` + `priceDeltaSnapshot`, note nếu có, line total, và thông tin void nếu đơn đã void.
5. Given order detail đang mở, when user đóng bằng nút đóng, phím Escape hoặc click outside theo pattern Dialog hiện có, then quay lại bảng không mất filter hiện tại và không refetch không cần thiết ngoài behavior React Query bình thường.
6. Given admin nhập mã đơn vào ô tìm kiếm, when áp dụng filter, then bảng chỉ hiển thị đơn có `orderCode` match theo search term; search được truyền qua query param API `order_code` hoặc `search` theo contract backend được tạo trong story này, đồng thời sync URL param FE để reload/share link giữ filter.
7. Given admin chọn `from` và/hoặc `to`, when áp dụng date range, then API lọc theo `soldAt` trong khoảng ngày đó, diễn giải theo ngày Việt Nam/Asia Ho Chi Minh giống reports; `from` là đầu ngày, `to` là cuối ngày; nếu chỉ có một đầu thì lọc một phía.
8. Given `from > to`, when user áp dụng filter, then không gọi API danh sách, hiển thị validation message thân thiện bằng tiếng Việt gần filter và giữ bảng/empty state không crash.
9. Given không có đơn phù hợp filter, when API trả empty list, then bảng hiển thị empty state tiếng Việt rõ ràng (vd "Không tìm thấy đơn hàng") và không hiển thị lỗi kỹ thuật.
10. Given API lỗi 400/401/403/5xx/network, when fetch list/detail thất bại, then UI dùng pattern lỗi admin hiện có: 400 filter lỗi inline nếu phù hợp, 401/403 để auth/role gate xử lý hiện có, 5xx/network hiển thị thông báo an toàn + nút thử lại; không render raw stack/ProblemDetails nhạy cảm.
11. Given backend chưa có endpoint list/detail orders, when triển khai story này, then thêm endpoint admin/server-side phù hợp trong `pos-api/src/orders/`: `GET /api/v1/orders` cho list và `GET /api/v1/orders/:id` cho detail, bearer + role `admin` tối thiểu; không làm regression `POST /api/v1/orders` sync và `POST /api/v1/orders/:id/void` hiện có cho cashier/admin.
12. Given API list/detail orders, when truy vấn database, then mọi query đi qua `OrdersService` → `OrdersRepository` → `PrismaService` với tenant context; không dùng raw query bỏ qua scope; không trả đơn của tenant/store khác; snapshot fields giữ read-only.
13. Given response contract, when FE gọi API, then DTO trả JSON camelCase và date ISO UTC; payment method được map sang FE-friendly union `cash | transfer | card`; VND là integer; detail trả snapshot data đầy đủ, không join/link sang product hiện tại để tránh sai lịch sử đơn cũ.
14. Given list có nhiều đơn, when hiển thị lần đầu, then sort mặc định theo `soldAt DESC` hoặc `createdAt/syncedAt DESC` nếu architecture quyết định, mới nhất trước; nếu backend hỗ trợ pagination thì FE hiển thị controls theo pattern admin, còn nếu chưa pagination thì giới hạn hợp lý và document trong Dev Agent Record. Không được load detail của mọi row upfront.
15. Given accessibility, when dùng keyboard/screen reader, then filter inputs có label, button xem chi tiết có aria-label chứa mã đơn, detail dialog có title accessible, table có header semantic, focus indicator không bị xóa, touch target ≥44px.
16. Given responsive admin layout, when ở mobile/tablet/desktop, then filter panel wrap hợp lý, table không overflow xấu (dùng `overflow-x-auto`/AdminDataTable pattern), detail dialog/drawer scroll được trong viewport.
17. Given tests, when hoàn tất, then cover tối thiểu:
    - Sidebar có "Đơn hàng" trước "Menu" và active/link đúng.
    - Router lazy route `/admin/orders` render page.
    - Orders page gọi API đúng params cho search/order code và from/to, validate `from > to` không gọi API.
    - Table render orders, VND/date/payment labels đúng, empty/error state đúng.
    - Click "Xem chi tiết" fetch/render detail snapshot items/options và close giữ filter.
    - Backend controller/service/repository tests cover list/detail success, tenant scope, filter orderCode/date range, not found/forbidden-safe behavior.
18. Given gates, when story hoàn tất, then từ `pos-api/` chạy/document `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test`; từ `pos-web/` chạy/document `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`, `npm test`, `npm run build`; không thêm dependency mới trừ khi có lý do cực mạnh.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Inspect current admin/order implementation and freeze contracts (AC: 1-4, 11-14)
  - [x] Read `pos-web/src/routes/admin/tailadmin/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`, `pos-web/src/app-router.tsx`, current admin menu/reports pages, and shared admin components.
  - [x] Read `pos-api/src/orders/orders.controller.ts`, `orders.service.ts`, `repositories/orders.repository.ts`, Prisma `Order`/`OrderItem`/`OrderItemOption`/`OrderVoid` schema.
  - [x] Define list/detail response DTOs and FE types before wiring UI; keep camelCase and snapshot-only detail.

- [x] Backend orders list/detail API (AC: 7, 10-14, 17)
  - [x] Add DTO/query validation for `GET /orders`: optional `order_code` or `search`, optional `from`, `to`; validate ISO/date input and `from <= to` if both provided.
  - [x] Add `GET /orders` in `OrdersController` with `@Roles('admin')`, Swagger docs, ProblemDetails-compatible errors.
  - [x] Add `GET /orders/:id` detail endpoint with `@Roles('admin')`; return 404 ProblemDetails if missing in current tenant/store.
  - [x] Implement service methods for list/detail; keep business validation out of controller.
  - [x] Implement repository queries through tenant context; include items/options/voids/cashier minimal fields; default sort newest first; no raw unscoped query.
  - [x] Ensure existing `POST /orders` sync and `POST /orders/:id/void` tests still pass.

- [x] Frontend API/types for admin orders (AC: 3-14)
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/features/admin/orders/api.ts` with `fetchAdminOrders`, `fetchAdminOrderDetail`, query keys, DTO types.
  - [x] Use `apiClient`; do not duplicate auth/interceptor logic; map query params consistently with BE (`order_code`/`from`/`to`).
  - [x] Add unit tests for API param building if project pattern supports it.

- [x] Sidebar and router wiring (AC: 1-2, 17)
  - [x] Update `AppSidebar.tsx` navItems: add `Đơn hàng` link above `Menu` using an appropriate lucide icon already available (e.g. receipt/list icon), preserving Dashboard/Menu/Báo cáo behavior.
  - [x] Update `app-router.tsx` to lazy-load `/admin/orders` page under admin role gate.
  - [x] Add/update tests to verify order and active state.

- [x] Admin Orders page UI (AC: 2-10, 14-16)
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/routes/admin/orders/orders-page.tsx` and colocated tests.
  - [x] Render `PageBreadcrumb pageTitle="Đơn hàng"`, helper copy, filter card with order code search and from/to date inputs, apply/reset behavior synced to URL params.
  - [x] Use `AdminDataTable` or current table pattern to render one row per order with required columns and `Xem chi tiết` row action.
  - [x] Implement validation for reversed date range before query execution.
  - [x] Implement loading skeleton, empty state, safe error state + retry consistent with products/reports admin pages.
  - [x] Implement detail dialog/drawer component, fetch detail on demand only, show snapshot items/options/notes/totals/void info.
  - [x] Preserve filters and table data when opening/closing detail.

- [x] Tests and gates (AC: 15-18)
  - [x] Backend controller/service/repository specs for list/detail filters/detail snapshots/errors.
  - [x] Frontend Testing Library tests for route/sidebar/page/filter/table/detail dialog states.
  - [x] Run and document BE gates: `cd pos-api && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test`.
  - [x] Run and document FE gates: `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build`.

## Dev Notes

### Source Requirements

- User requirement: admin sidebar/page must add **"Đơn hàng"** above **"Menu"**, list all orders as table rows, each row has detail button, support search/filter by order code and from/to date range, and reuse existing admin style/components.
- Sprint status before this story had Epics 1-4 only; Epic 4 reports complete with retrospective optional. This story is added as new admin/orders Epic 5 Story 5.1 because no backlog story existed for admin order management and it is adjacent to existing orders/reports/admin work rather than part of completed Epic 4 scope.
- Architecture source of truth: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md` defines orders module, `/api/v1/orders`, tenant scoping, ProblemDetails, snapshot immutability, API naming, FE route structure.
- Project context: `_bmad-output/project-context.md` requires TypeScript strict, React 18/Vite, NestJS 11, Prisma 7, TanStack Query for admin server-state, no local/session storage tokens, no raw unscoped DB query.

### Current Code State (must preserve)

`pos-web/src/routes/admin/tailadmin/layout/AppSidebar.tsx` currently has main nav in this order:
1. Dashboard (`/admin`)
2. Menu group (`/admin/menu/categories`, `/admin/menu/products`, `/admin/menu/option-groups`)
3. Báo cáo (`/admin/reports`)

This story must insert `Đơn hàng` between Dashboard and Menu. Do not rewrite TailAdmin layout or collapse/hover behavior.

`pos-web/src/app-router.tsx` currently lazy-loads admin children:
- index admin home
- `menu/categories`
- `menu/products`
- `menu/option-groups`
- `reports`

Add only `orders`; keep `ProtectedRoute` and `AdminRoleGate` unchanged.

Existing admin page/component patterns to reuse:
- Menu pages use `PageBreadcrumb`, `AdminDataTable`, `AdminButton`, `AdminInput`, `AdminSelect`, Dialog components, safe toast/error copy.
- Reports page uses date range validation/canonical URL params and safe server error handling.
- Shared admin data table exists at `pos-web/src/shared/components/admin/admin-data-table.tsx`; it provides row actions and skeleton rows.

Backend `pos-api/src/orders/orders.controller.ts` currently exposes only:
- `POST /api/v1/orders` with `@Roles('cashier', 'admin')` for idempotent sync.
- `POST /api/v1/orders/:id/void` with `@Roles('cashier', 'admin')` for void.

Do not break these endpoints or their role permissions/tests.

### Data Model / Snapshot Guardrails

Prisma order schema currently includes:
- `Order`: `id`, `tenantId`, `storeId`, `clientOrderId`, `orderCode`, `deviceId`, `cashierId`, `soldAt`, `syncedAt`, `menuVersionAtSale`, `discountAmount`, `total`, `paymentMethod`, `items`, `voids`, `createdAt`.
- `OrderItem`: `productNameSnapshot`, `unitPriceSnapshot`, `quantity`, `note`, `lineTotal`, `options`.
- `OrderItemOption`: `labelSnapshot`, `priceDeltaSnapshot`.
- `OrderVoid`: `reason`, `voidedAt`, `voidedBy`.

Snapshot fields are immutable historical truth. The admin detail must display snapshot fields directly and must not join to current product/option names for display.

### Suggested API Contract

Recommended BE endpoints:

```txt
GET /api/v1/orders?order_code=20260521-POS01-0001&from=2026-05-01&to=2026-05-21
GET /api/v1/orders/:id
```

Recommended list row shape:

```ts
type AdminOrderListItem = {
  id: string
  orderCode: string
  soldAt: string
  syncedAt: string
  cashierName?: string | null
  paymentMethod: 'cash' | 'transfer' | 'card'
  discountAmount: number
  total: number
  itemLineCount: number
  itemQuantity: number
  isVoided: boolean
  voidedAt?: string | null
}
```

Recommended detail shape:

```ts
type AdminOrderDetail = AdminOrderListItem & {
  clientOrderId: string
  deviceId: string
  menuVersionAtSale: number
  voids: Array<{ id: string; reason: string; voidedAt: string; voidedByName?: string | null }>
  items: Array<{
    id: string
    productNameSnapshot: string
    unitPriceSnapshot: number
    quantity: number
    note?: string | null
    lineTotal: number
    options: Array<{ id: string; labelSnapshot: string; priceDeltaSnapshot: number }>
  }>
}
```

If implementation chooses `search` instead of `order_code`, align FE/BE/tests and document it. Architecture says REST query params are `snake_case`; prefer `order_code`.

### Date Range Semantics

- User-facing date inputs can be `YYYY-MM-DD`.
- Interpret range as Vietnam local calendar days, consistent with reports: `from` start-of-day Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh, `to` end-of-day Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh.
- Backend should make the final DB comparison against `soldAt` timestamps using UTC instants derived from those local dates.
- Validate `from <= to`; FE should catch before calling API, BE should also reject invalid input via ProblemDetails.

### Previous Story Intelligence

Recent admin/report stories established patterns:
- Story 3.10 moved admin UI to TailAdmin layout; keep `data-admin-scope`, TailAdmin classes, and AppSidebar behavior.
- Stories 3.3/3.5/3.7 established CRUD page style: filter card, `AdminDataTable`, row actions, Dialog, safe error messages.
- Stories 4.2-4.4 established reports date range handling, `PageBreadcrumb`, `SectionCard`, URL param behavior, no raw technical errors, and Vietnamese timezone hint.
- Story 4.4 showed snapshot data should not link back to mutable product records; same rule applies to order detail.

Recent git commits are generic (`785f6df update`, `6bb310e update pos ui`, `0f0c937 update`, `9cb483b fix: set rootDir=src...`, `1008bcd fix: add postinstall...`); rely on current source inspection over commit titles.

### Regression Guardrails

- Do not create a separate admin shell/sidebar. Use existing TailAdmin `AppLayout` and `AppSidebar`.
- Do not fetch order detail for every row; fetch on demand when opening detail.
- Do not expose orders across tenants/stores; use tenant context middleware and repository methods.
- Do not mutate order snapshots or add edit/delete functionality in this story.
- Do not change POS offline order sync payload, Dexie pending order flow, receipt modal, sync engine, or void flow unless tests reveal a strictly necessary type reuse adjustment.
- Do not use `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`; React text escaping is sufficient for order/item labels/notes.
- Do not add dependencies for simple tables/dialogs/date inputs; current stack is enough.
- Do not show raw ProblemDetails `traceId`/stack to admin users unless existing app pattern already does so intentionally.

### Project Structure Notes

Expected files to add/update:

```txt
pos-api/src/orders/
├── dto/list-orders-query.dto.ts        # NEW recommended
├── dto/admin-order-response.dto.ts     # NEW optional/recommended
├── orders.controller.ts                # UPDATE add GET list/detail
├── orders.service.ts                   # UPDATE add list/detail service methods
├── repositories/orders.repository.ts   # UPDATE add list/detail queries
├── orders.controller.spec.ts           # UPDATE
└── orders.service.spec.ts              # UPDATE

pos-web/src/features/admin/orders/
└── api.ts                              # NEW

pos-web/src/routes/admin/orders/
├── orders-page.tsx                     # NEW
└── orders-page.test.tsx                # NEW

pos-web/src/routes/admin/tailadmin/layout/AppSidebar.tsx  # UPDATE nav
pos-web/src/app-router.tsx                                  # UPDATE route
```

If repository tests are not currently separated, keep test style consistent with existing `orders.service.spec.ts` and avoid over-engineering.

### Testing Requirements

Backend:
- Controller tests should assert `GET /orders` and `GET /orders/:id` call service with tenant context and query/id.
- Service tests should assert validation/date/query delegation and not found mapping if service owns it.
- Repository/service integration-style unit tests should mock Prisma and verify `where` includes tenant/store context via `runWithTenantContext` pattern or expected scoped `findMany`/`findFirst` calls.
- Existing sync/void tests must remain green.

Frontend:
- Follow existing Vitest + Testing Library style from `categories-page.test.tsx`, `products-page.test.tsx`, `reports-page.test.tsx`.
- Mock `apiClient.get`; assert URLs and params for list/detail.
- Use `MemoryRouter`/router helper consistent with existing route tests.
- Prefer role/label queries over test ids, except where existing admin components make that impractical.

### Completion Notes List

- Implemented admin orders list/detail API with admin-only GET endpoints, tenant/store scoped Prisma queries, orderCode search, Vietnam date range boundaries, and snapshot-only detail payloads.
- Implemented `/admin/orders` page in existing TailAdmin layout with URL-synced filters, validation for reversed dates, table rows, empty/error states, and on-demand detail dialog.
- Added sidebar item “Đơn hàng” above “Menu” and router lazy route for `/admin/orders`; fixed sidebar submenu state derivation so React Compiler no longer flags synchronous set-state-in-effect, while active submenu behavior remains route-derived.
- Restored `aria-label="Điều hướng Admin"` on sidebar navigation so existing admin shell accessibility test passes.
- List endpoint intentionally limits first page to 200 newest orders (`soldAt DESC`, then `createdAt DESC`); pagination controls not added in this story.
- Story gates are complete except `pos-api npm run lint`, which remains blocked by pre-existing unrelated lint failures outside admin orders scope.
